tabs.content:
.drop table production_quality
.set-or-replace production_quality <|
mqttdataraw
| project message = base64_decode_tostring(data_base64)
| project ParsedMessage = parse_json(message)
| extend
    product_id = toint(ParsedMessage["product_id"]),
    batch_id = tostring(ParsedMessage["batch_id"]),
    machine_id = toint(ParsedMessage["machine_id"]),
    production_line = tostring(ParsedMessage["production_line"]),
    timestamp = todatetime(ParsedMessage["timestamp"]),
    cycle_time_seconds = todouble(ParsedMessage["cycle_time_seconds"]),
    first_pass_yield = toint(iif(tobool(ParsedMessage["first_pass_yield"]), 1, 0)),
    rework_required = toint(iif(tobool(ParsedMessage["rework_required"]), 1, 0)),
    operator_id = tostring(ParsedMessage["operator_id"]),
    site_id = toint(ParsedMessage["site_id"]),
    dimensional_check = toint(iif(
        tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage["test_results"]["dimensional_check"])) == "pass", 1, 0)),
    surface_quality = toint(iif(
        tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage["test_results"]["surface_quality"])) == "pass", 1, 0)),
    electrical_test = toint(iif(
        tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage["test_results"]["electrical_test"])) == "pass", 1, 0)),
    performance_test = toint(iif(
        tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage["test_results"]["performance_test"])) == "pass", 1, 0)),
    defect_count = toint(ParsedMessage["quality_metrics"]["defect_count"]),
    inspection_count = toint(ParsedMessage["quality_metrics"]["inspection_count"]),
    pass_rate_percentage = todouble(ParsedMessage["quality_metrics"]["pass_rate_percentage"])
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| extend
    Date = format_datetime(timestamp, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    Time = format_datetime(timestamp, "HH:mm:ss")
| project
    product_id,
    batch_id,
    machine_id,
    production_line,
    Date,
    Time,
    timestamp,
    cycle_time_seconds,
    operator_id,
    site_id,
    first_pass_yield,
    rework_required,
    dimensional_check,
    surface_quality,
    electrical_test,
    performance_test,
    defect_count,
    inspection_count,
    pass_rate_percentage

.alter table production_quality policy update @'[{"Source": "mqttdataraw", "Query": "mqttdataraw | project message = base64_decode_tostring(data_base64) | project ParsedMessage = parse_json(message) | extend product_id = toint(ParsedMessage[\"product_id\"]), batch_id = tostring(ParsedMessage[\"batch_id\"]), machine_id = toint(ParsedMessage[\"machine_id\"]), production_line = tostring(ParsedMessage[\"production_line\"]), timestamp = todatetime(ParsedMessage[\"timestamp\"]), cycle_time_seconds = todouble(ParsedMessage[\"cycle_time_seconds\"]), first_pass_yield = toint(iif(tobool(ParsedMessage[\"first_pass_yield\"]), 1, 0)), rework_required = toint(iif(tobool(ParsedMessage[\"rework_required\"]), 1, 0)), operator_id = tostring(ParsedMessage[\"operator_id\"]), site_id = toint(ParsedMessage[\"site_id\"]), dimensional_check = toint(iif(tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage[\"test_results\"][\"dimensional_check\"])) == \"pass\", 1, 0)), surface_quality = toint(iif(tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage[\"test_results\"][\"surface_quality\"])) == \"pass\", 1, 0)), electrical_test = toint(iif(tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage[\"test_results\"][\"electrical_test\"])) == \"pass\", 1, 0)), performance_test = toint(iif(tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage[\"test_results\"][\"performance_test\"])) == \"pass\", 1, 0)), defect_count = toint(ParsedMessage[\"quality_metrics\"][\"defect_count\"]), inspection_count = toint(ParsedMessage[\"quality_metrics\"][\"inspection_count\"]), pass_rate_percentage = todouble(ParsedMessage[\"quality_metrics\"][\"pass_rate_percentage\"]) | extend Date = format_datetime(timestamp, \"yyyy-MM-dd\"), Time = format_datetime(timestamp, \"HH:mm:ss\") | project product_id, batch_id, machine_id, production_line, Date, Time, timestamp, cycle_time_seconds, operator_id, site_id, first_pass_yield, rework_required, dimensional_check, surface_quality, electrical_test, performance_test, defect_count, inspection_count, pass_rate_percentage", "IsEnabled": true}]'
.alter-merge table production_quality policy mirroring dataformat=parquet with (IsEnabled=true, TargetLatencyInMinutes=5);

.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Demo", docstring = "Availability", skipvalidation = "true", view = true) Availability() {
    let production_start = ago(1h);

production_quality
| where timestamp > production_start
| extend timebin10s = bin(timestamp, 10s)
| summarize by machine_id, site_id, timebin10s
| summarize Uptime_in_sec = 10*count(timebin10s), min(timebin10s), max(timebin10s) by machine_id, site_id
| extend production_start = production_start
| extend Planned_Production_Time_in_sec = datetime_diff('second', now(), production_start)
| extend Availability = min_of(100.0, round(todecimal(100*Uptime_in_sec)/Planned_Production_Time_in_sec,2))
}
production_quality
| top 100 by timestamp

.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Demo", docstring = "Performance", skipvalidation = "true", view = true) Performance() {
    let production_start = ago(10m);
let ideal_cycle_time = 4;

production_quality
| where timestamp > production_start
| extend machine_id = toint(machine_id)
| extend site_id = toint(site_id)
| summarize Actual_Output = count(product_id), sum_cycle_time_in_seconds = sum(cycle_time_seconds) by machine_id, site_id
| extend Ideal_Output = max_of(sum_cycle_time_in_seconds/ideal_cycle_time, 0.000000001)
| extend Performance = min_of(100.0, round(100*Actual_Output/Ideal_Output, 2))
}

.alter table production_quality policy update "[{\"IsEnabled\":true,\"Source\":\"mqttdataraw\",\"Query\":\"mqttdataraw | project message = base64_decode_tostring(data_base64) | project ParsedMessage = parse_json(message) | extend product_id = toint(ParsedMessage[\\\"product_id\\\"]), batch_id = tostring(ParsedMessage[\\\"batch_id\\\"]), machine_id = toint(ParsedMessage[\\\"machine_id\\\"]), production_line = tostring(ParsedMessage[\\\"production_line\\\"]), timestamp = todatetime(ParsedMessage[\\\"timestamp\\\"]), cycle_time_seconds = todouble(ParsedMessage[\\\"cycle_time_seconds\\\"]), first_pass_yield = toint(iif(tobool(ParsedMessage[\\\"first_pass_yield\\\"]), 1, 0)), rework_required = toint(iif(tobool(ParsedMessage[\\\"rework_required\\\"]), 1, 0)), operator_id = tostring(ParsedMessage[\\\"operator_id\\\"]), site_id = toint(ParsedMessage[\\\"site_id\\\"]), dimensional_check = toint(iif(tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage[\\\"test_results\\\"][\\\"dimensional_check\\\"])) == \\\"pass\\\", 1, 0)), surface_quality = toint(iif(tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage[\\\"test_results\\\"][\\\"surface_quality\\\"])) == \\\"pass\\\", 1, 0)), electrical_test = toint(iif(tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage[\\\"test_results\\\"][\\\"electrical_test\\\"])) == \\\"pass\\\", 1, 0)), performance_test = toint(iif(tolower(tostring(ParsedMessage[\\\"test_results\\\"][\\\"performance_test\\\"])) == \\\"pass\\\", 1, 0)), defect_count = toint(ParsedMessage[\\\"quality_metrics\\\"][\\\"defect_count\\\"]), inspection_count = toint(ParsedMessage[\\\"quality_metrics\\\"][\\\"inspection_count\\\"]), pass_rate_percentage = todouble(ParsedMessage[\\\"quality_metrics\\\"][\\\"pass_rate_percentage\\\"]) | extend Date = format_datetime(timestamp, \\\"yyyy-MM-dd\\\"), Time = format_datetime(timestamp, \\\"HH:mm:ss\\\") | project product_id, batch_id, machine_id, production_line, Date, Time, timestamp, cycle_time_seconds, operator_id, site_id, first_pass_yield, rework_required, dimensional_check, surface_quality, electrical_test, performance_test, defect_count, inspection_count, pass_rate_percentage\",\"IsTransactional\":false,\"PropagateIngestionProperties\":false,\"ManagedIdentity\":null}]"

production_quality

.create-or-alter table machineraw ingestion json mapping 'machineraw_mapping'
```
[{"Properties":{"Path":"$['machine_id']"},"column":"machine_id","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['site_id']"},"column":"site_id","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['sensors']"},"column":"sensors","datatype":""}]
```

.create-or-alter table machineraw ingestion json mapping 'machineraw_mapping_1'
```
[{"Properties":{"Path":"$['machine_id']"},"column":"machine_id","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['site_id']"},"column":"site_id","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['sensors']"},"column":"sensors","datatype":""}]
```

.alter-merge table sensors_parsed policy mirroring dataformat=parquet with (IsEnabled=true, TargetLatencyInMinutes=5);


.set-or-replace machines_internal <| external_table("machines") | extend machineid = toint(machineid) | extend siteid = toint(siteid)
 | extend machinetypeid = toint(machinetypeid) | extend manufacturerid = toint(manufacturerid) |  extend manufactureyear = toint(manufactureyear)
 |  extend hourlycapacity = toreal(hourlycapacity)

.set-or-replace sites_internal <| external_table("sites") | extend siteid = toint(siteid) |extend  capacity = toint(capacity) | extend establishedyear = toint(establishedyear)

.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Demo", docstring = "Availability", skipvalidation = "true", view = true) Availability() {
    let production_start = ago(1h);

production_quality
| where timestamp > production_start
| extend timebin10s = bin(timestamp, 10s)
| summarize by machine_id, site_id, timebin10s
| summarize Uptime_in_sec = 10*count(timebin10s), min(timebin10s), max(timebin10s) by machine_id, site_id
| extend production_start = production_start
| extend Planned_Production_Time_in_sec = datetime_diff('second', now(), production_start)
| extend Availability = min_of(100.0, round(todecimal(100*Uptime_in_sec)/Planned_Production_Time_in_sec,2))
}

.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Demo", docstring = "Performance", skipvalidation = "true", view = true) Performance() {
    let production_start = ago(10m);
let ideal_cycle_time = 4;

production_quality
| where timestamp > production_start
| extend machine_id = toint(machine_id)
| extend site_id = toint(site_id)
| summarize Actual_Output = count(product_id), sum_cycle_time_in_seconds = sum(cycle_time_seconds) by machine_id, site_id
| extend Ideal_Output = max_of(sum_cycle_time_in_seconds/ideal_cycle_time, 0.000000001)
| extend Performance = min_of(100.0, round(100*Actual_Output/Ideal_Output, 2))
}

.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Demo", docstring = "Quality", skipvalidation = "true", view = true) Quality() {
    let production_start = ago(10m);

production_quality
| where timestamp > production_start
| extend machine_id = toint(machine_id)
| extend site_id = toint(site_id)
| summarize Good_Products=sum(first_pass_yield), Total_Products=count(product_id) by machine_id, site_id
| extend Quality = min_of(100.0, round(100*Good_Products/Total_Products, 2))
}


Availability () 
| lookup machines_internal on $left.machine_id==$right.machineid
| lookup sites_internal on $left.site_id==$right.siteid
| project machinename, sitename, Availability, Uptime_in_sec, Planned_Production_Time_in_sec

Availability () 
| lookup machines_internal on $left.machine_id==$right.machineid
| lookup sites_internal on $left.site_id==$right.siteid
| lookup Performance() on $left.machine_id==$right.machine_id
| lookup Quality() on $left.machine_id==$right.machine_id
| extend OEE = toreal((Availability*Performance*Quality))/10000
| project machinename, sitename, OEE, Availability, Performance, Quality

.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Demo", docstring = "Availability", skipvalidation = "true", view = true) Availability() {
    let production_start = ago(10m);

production_quality
| where timestamp > production_start
| extend timebin10s = bin(timestamp, 10s)
| summarize by machine_id, site_id, timebin10s
| summarize Uptime_in_sec = 10*count(timebin10s), min(timebin10s), max(timebin10s) by machine_id, site_id
| extend production_start = production_start
| extend Planned_Production_Time_in_sec = datetime_diff('second', now(), production_start)
| extend Availability = min_of(100.0, round(todecimal(100*Uptime_in_sec)/Planned_Production_Time_in_sec,2))
}
